scripts.build: npm run --workspace=@insightflare/edge build && npm run --workspace=@insightflare/dashboard build
scripts.mono:build: npm run prebuild:mono:local && npm run --workspace=@insightflare/dashboard cf:build
scripts.mono:preview: npm run prebuild:mono:local && npm run --workspace=@insightflare/dashboard cf:preview
scripts.mono:deploy:dry-run: npm run prebuild:mono:remote && npm run --workspace=@insightflare/dashboard cf:deploy -- --dry-run
scripts.mono:deploy: npm run prebuild:mono:remote && npm run --workspace=@insightflare/dashboard cf:deploy
scripts.ci:deploy:dry-run: npm run prebuild:mono:remote && npm exec --workspace=@insightflare/dashboard -- wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml --dry-run
scripts.ci:deploy: npm run prebuild:mono:remote && npm exec --workspace=@insightflare/dashboard -- wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml
scripts.cf:d1:create: npm exec --workspace=@insightflare/dashboard -- wrangler d1 create insightflare
scripts.cf:secret:daily-salt: npm exec --workspace=@insightflare/dashboard -- wrangler secret put DAILY_SALT_SECRET --config wrangler.toml
scripts.cf:secret:admin-token: npm exec --workspace=@insightflare/dashboard -- wrangler secret put ADMIN_API_TOKEN --config wrangler.toml
scripts.cf:secret:dashboard-password: npm exec --workspace=@insightflare/dashboard -- wrangler secret put DASHBOARD_PASSWORD --config wrangler.toml
scripts.typecheck: npm run --workspace=@insightflare/edge typecheck && npm run --workspace=@insightflare/dashboard typecheck
